23:23:28.489   var React = __turbopack_context__.r(271645);
23:23:28.489   function _interopDefaultLegacy(e) {
23:23:28.489   return e && typeof e === 'object' && 'default' in e ? e : {
23:23:28.489   'default': e
23:23:28.489   };
23:23:28.489   }
23:23:28.489   var React__default = /*#__PURE__*/ _interopDefaultLegacy(React);
23:23:28.489   /*
23:23:28.489   Based on Glamor's sheet
23:23:28.489   https://github.com/threepointone/glamor/blob/667b480d31b3721a905021b26e1290ce92ca2879/src/sheet.js
23:23:28.489   */ function _defineProperties(target, props) {
23:23:28.489   for(var i = 0; i < props.length; i++){
23:23:28.489   var descriptor = props[i];
23:23:28.489   descriptor.enumerable = descriptor.enumerable || false;
23:23:28.489   descriptor.configurable = true;
23:23:28.489   if ("value" in descriptor) descriptor.writable = true;
23:23:28.489   Object.defineProperty(target, descriptor.key, descriptor);
23:23:28.489   }
23:23:28.489   }
23:23:28.489   function _createClass(Constructor, protoProps, staticProps) {
23:23:28.490   if (protoProps) _defineProperties(Constructor.prototype, protoProps);
23:23:28.490   if (staticProps) _defineProperties(Constructor, staticProps);
23:23:28.490   return Constructor;
23:23:28.490   }
23:23:28.490   var isProd = typeof __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__["default"] !== "undefined" && __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__["default"].env && ("TURBOPACK compile-time value", "production") === "production";
23:23:28.490   var isString = function(o) {
23:23:28.490   return Object.prototype.toString.call(o) === "[object String]";
23:23:28.490   };
23:23:28.490   var StyleSheet = /*#__PURE__*/ function() {
23:23:28.490   function StyleSheet(param) {
23:23:28.490   var ref = param === void 0 ? {} : param, _name = ref.name, name = _name === void 0 ? "stylesheet" : _name, _optimizeForSpeed = ref.optimizeForSpeed, optimizeForSpeed = _optimizeForSpeed === void 0 ? isProd : _optimizeForSpeed;
23:23:28.490   invariant$1(isString(name), "`name` must be a string");
23:23:28.490   this._name = name;
23:23:28.490   this._deletedRulePlaceholder = "#" + name + "-deleted-rule____{}";
23:23:28.490   invariant$1(typeof optimizeForSpeed === "boolean", "`optimizeForSpeed` must be a boolean");
23:23:28.490   this._optimizeForSpeed = optimizeForSpeed;
23:23:28.490   this._serverSheet = undefined;
23:23:28.490   this._tags = [];
23:23:28.491   this._injected = false;
23:23:28.491   this._rulesCount = 0;
23:23:28.491   var node = typeof window !== "undefined" && document.querySelector('meta[property="csp-nonce"]');
23:23:28.491   this._nonce = node ? node.getAttribute("content") : null;
23:23:28.491   }
23:23:28.491   var _proto = StyleSheet.prototype;
23:23:28.491   _proto.setOptimizeForSpeed = function setOptimizeForSpeed(bool) {
23:23:28.491   invariant$1(typeof bool === "boolean", "`setOptimizeForSpeed` accepts a boolean");
23:23:28.491   invariant$1(this._rulesCount === 0, "optimizeForSpeed cannot be when rules have already been inserted");
23:23:28.491   this.flush();
23:23:28.491   this._optimizeForSpeed = bool;
23:23:28.491   this.inject();
23:23:28.491   };
23:23:28.491   _proto.isOptimizeForSpeed = function isOptimizeForSpeed() {
23:23:28.491   return this._optimizeForSpeed;
23:23:28.491   };
23:23:28.491   _proto.inject = function inject() {
23:23:28.491   var _this = this;
23:23:28.491   invariant$1(!this._injected, "sheet already injected");
23:23:28.491   this._injected = true;
23:23:28.491   if (typeof window !== "undefined" && this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:28.492   this._tags[0] = this.makeStyleTag(this._name);
23:23:28.492   this._optimizeForSpeed = "insertRule" in this.getSheet();
23:23:28.492   if (!this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:28.492   if (!isProd) {
23:23:28.492   console.warn("StyleSheet: optimizeForSpeed mode not supported falling back to standard mode.");
23:23:28.492   }
23:23:28.492   this.flush();
23:23:28.492   this._injected = true;
23:23:28.492   }
23:23:28.492   return;
23:23:28.492   }
23:23:28.492   this._serverSheet = {
23:23:28.492   cssRules: [],
23:23:28.492   insertRule: function(rule, index) {
23:23:28.492   if (typeof index === "number") {
23:23:28.492   _this._serverSheet.cssRules[index] = {
23:23:28.492   cssText: rule
23:23:28.492   };
23:23:28.493   } else {
23:23:28.493   _this._serverSheet.cssRules.push({
23:23:28.493   cssText: rule
23:23:28.493   });
23:23:28.493   }
23:23:28.493   return index;
23:23:28.493   },
23:23:28.493   deleteRule: function(index) {
23:23:28.493   _this._serverSheet.cssRules[index] = null;
23:23:28.493   }
23:23:28.493   };
23:23:28.493   };
23:23:28.493   _proto.getSheetForTag = function getSheetForTag(tag) {
23:23:28.493   if (tag.sheet) {
23:23:28.493   return tag.sheet;
23:23:28.493   }
23:23:28.493   // this weirdness brought to you by firefox
23:23:28.493   for(var i = 0; i < document.styleSheets.length; i++){
23:23:28.493   if (document.styleSheets[i].ownerNode === tag) {
23:23:28.493   return document.styleSheets[i];
23:23:28.493   }
23:23:28.493   }
23:23:28.493   };
23:23:28.493   _proto.getSheet = function getSheet() {
23:23:28.493   return this.getSheetForTag(this._tags[this._tags.length - 1]);
23:23:28.494   };
23:23:28.494   _proto.insertRule = function insertRule(rule, index) {
23:23:28.494   invariant$1(isString(rule), "`insertRule` accepts only strings");
23:23:28.494   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:28.494   if (typeof index !== "number") {
23:23:28.494   index = this._serverSheet.cssRules.length;
23:23:28.494   }
23:23:28.494   this._serverSheet.insertRule(rule, index);
23:23:28.494   return this._rulesCount++;
23:23:28.494   }
23:23:28.494   if (this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:28.494   var sheet = this.getSheet();
23:23:28.494   if (typeof index !== "number") {
23:23:28.494   index = sheet.cssRules.length;
23:23:28.494   }
23:23:28.494   // this weirdness for perf, and chrome's weird bug
23:23:28.494   // https://stackoverflow.com/questions/20007992/chrome-suddenly-stopped-accepting-insertrule
23:23:28.494   try {
23:23:28.494   sheet.insertRule(rule, index);
23:23:28.494   } catch (error) {
23:23:28.494   if (!isProd) {
23:23:28.494   console.warn("StyleSheet: illegal rule: \n\n" + rule + "\n\nSee https://stackoverflow.com/q/20007992 for more info");
23:23:28.494   }
23:23:28.494   return -1;
23:23:28.495   }
23:23:28.495   } else {
23:23:28.495   var insertionPoint = this._tags[index];
23:23:28.495   this._tags.push(this.makeStyleTag(this._name, rule, insertionPoint));
23:23:28.495   }
23:23:28.495   return this._rulesCount++;
23:23:28.495   };
23:23:28.495   _proto.replaceRule = function replaceRule(index, rule) {
23:23:28.495   if (this._optimizeForSpeed || typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:28.496   var sheet = typeof window !== "undefined" ? this.getSheet() : this._serverSheet;
23:23:28.496   if (!rule.trim()) {
23:23:28.496   rule = this._deletedRulePlaceholder;
23:23:28.496   }
23:23:28.496   if (!sheet.cssRules[index]) {
23:23:28.496   // @TBD Should we throw an error?
23:23:28.496   return index;
23:23:28.496   }
23:23:28.496   sheet.deleteRule(index);
23:23:28.496   try {
23:23:28.496   sheet.insertRule(rule, index);
23:23:28.496   } catch (error) {
23:23:28.496   if (!isProd) {
23:23:28.496   console.warn("StyleSheet: illegal rule: \n\n" + rule + "\n\nSee https://stackoverflow.com/q/20007992 for more info");
23:23:28.496   }
23:23:28.497   // In order to preserve the indices we insert a deleteRulePlaceholder
23:23:28.497   sheet.insertRule(this._deletedRulePlaceholder, index);
23:23:28.497   }
23:23:28.497   } else {
23:23:28.497   var tag = this._tags[index];
23:23:28.497   invariant$1(tag, "old rule at index `" + index + "` not found");
23:23:28.497   tag.textContent = rule;
23:23:28.497   }
23:23:28.497   return index;
23:23:28.497   };
23:23:28.497   _proto.deleteRule = function deleteRule(index) {
23:23:28.497   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:28.497   this._serverSheet.deleteRule(index);
23:23:28.497   return;
23:23:28.497   }
23:23:28.497   if (this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:28.497   this.replaceRule(index, "");
23:23:28.497   } else {
23:23:28.497   var tag = this._tags[index];
23:23:28.497   invariant$1(tag, "rule at index `" + index + "` not found");
23:23:28.497   tag.parentNode.removeChild(tag);
23:23:28.497   this._tags[index] = null;
23:23:28.497   }
23:23:28.497   };
23:23:28.497   _proto.flush = function flush() {
23:23:28.497   this._injected = false;
23:23:28.497   this._rulesCount = 0;
23:23:28.497   if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
23:23:28.497   this._tags.forEach(function(tag) {
23:23:28.498   return tag && tag.parentNode.removeChild(tag);
23:23:28.498   });
23:23:28.498   this._tags = [];
23:23:28.498   } else {
23:23:28.498   // simpler on server
23:23:28.498   this._serverSheet.cssRules = [];
23:23:28.498   }
23:23:28.498   };
23:23:28.498   _proto.cssRules = function cssRules() {
23:23:28.498   var _this = this;
23:23:28.498   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:28.498   return this._serverSheet.cssRules;
23:23:28.498   }
23:23:28.498   return this._tags.reduce(function(rules, tag) {
23:23:28.498   if (tag) {
23:23:28.498   rules = rules.concat(Array.prototype.map.call(_this.getSheetForTag(tag).cssRules, function(rule) {
23:23:28.498   return rule.cssText === _this._deletedRulePlaceholder ? null : rule;
23:23:28.498   }));
23:23:28.498   } else {
23:23:28.498   rules.push(null);
23:23:28.498   }
23:23:28.498   return rules;
23:23:28.498   }, []);
23:23:28.498   };
23:23:28.498   _proto.makeStyleTag = function makeStyleTag(name, cssString, relativeToTag) {
23:23:28.498   if (cssString) {
23:23:28.498   invariant$1(isString(cssString), "makeStyleTag accepts only strings as second parameter");
23:23:28.498   }
23:23:28.498   var tag = document.createElement("style");
23:23:28.498   if (this._nonce) tag.setAttribute("nonce", this._nonce);
23:23:28.498   tag.type = "text/css";
23:23:28.498   tag.setAttribute("data-" + name, "");
23:23:28.499   if (cssString) {
23:23:28.499   tag.appendChild(document.createTextNode(cssString));
23:23:28.499   }
23:23:28.499   var head = document.head || document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0];
23:23:28.499   if (relativeToTag) {
23:23:28.499   head.insertBefore(tag, relativeToTag);
23:23:28.499   } else {
23:23:28.499   head.appendChild(tag);
23:23:28.499   }
23:23:28.499   return tag;
23:23:28.499   };
23:23:28.499   _createClass(StyleSheet, [
23:23:28.499   {
23:23:28.499   key: "length",
23:23:28.499   get: function get() {
23:23:28.499   return this._rulesCount;
23:23:28.499   }
23:23:28.499   }
23:23:28.499   ]);
23:23:28.499   return StyleSheet;
23:23:28.499   }();
23:23:28.499   function invariant$1(condition, message) {
23:23:28.499   if (!condition) {
23:23:28.499   throw new Error("StyleSheet: " + message + ".");
23:23:28.499   }
23:23:28.499   }
23:23:28.500   function hash(str) {
23:23:28.500   var _$hash = 5381, i = str.length;
23:23:28.500   while(i){
23:23:28.500   _$hash = _$hash * 33 ^ str.charCodeAt(--i);
23:23:28.500   }
23:23:28.500   /* JavaScript does bitwise operations (like XOR, above) on 32-bit signed
23:23:28.500      * integers. Since we want the results to be always positive, convert the
23:23:28.500      * signed int to an unsigned by doing an unsigned bitshift. */ return _$hash >>> 0;
23:23:28.500   }
23:23:28.500   var stringHash = hash;
23:23:28.500   var sanitize = function(rule) {
23:23:28.500   return rule.replace(/\/style/gi, "\\/style");
23:23:28.500   };
23:23:28.500   var cache = {};
23:23:28.500   /**
23:23:28.500    * computeId
23:23:28.500    *
23:23:28.500    * Compute and memoize a jsx id from a basedId and optionally props.
23:23:28.500    */ function computeId(baseId, props) {
23:23:28.500   if (!props) {
23:23:28.500   return "jsx-" + baseId;
23:23:28.500   }
23:23:28.500   var propsToString = String(props);
23:23:28.500   var key = baseId + propsToString;
23:23:28.501   if (!cache[key]) {
23:23:28.501   cache[key] = "jsx-" + stringHash(baseId + "-" + propsToString);
23:23:28.501   }
23:23:28.501   return cache[key];
23:23:28.501   }
23:23:28.501   /**
23:23:28.501    * computeSelector
23:23:28.501    *
23:23:28.501    * Compute and memoize dynamic selectors.
23:23:28.501    */ function computeSelector(id, css) {
23:23:28.501   var selectoPlaceholderRegexp = /__jsx-style-dynamic-selector/g;
23:23:28.501   // Sanitize SSR-ed CSS.
23:23:28.501   // Client side code doesn't need to be sanitized since we use
23:23:28.501   // document.createTextNode (dev) and the CSSOM api sheet.insertRule (prod).
23:23:28.501   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:28.501   css = sanitize(css);
23:23:28.501   }
23:23:28.501   var idcss = id + css;
23:23:28.503   if (!cache[idcss]) {
23:23:28.503   cache[idcss] = css.replace(selectoPlaceholderRegexp, id);
23:23:28.503   }
23:23:28.503   return cache[idcss];
23:23:28.503   }
23:23:28.503   function mapRulesToStyle(cssRules, options) {
23:23:28.503   if (options === void 0) options = {};
23:23:28.503   return cssRules.map(function(args) {
23:23:28.503   var id = args[0];
23:23:28.503   var css = args[1];
23:23:28.503   return /*#__PURE__*/ React__default["default"].createElement("style", {
23:23:28.503   id: "__" + id,
23:23:28.503   // Avoid warnings upon render with a key
23:23:28.503   key: "__" + id,
23:23:28.504   nonce: options.nonce ? options.nonce : undefined,
23:23:28.504   dangerouslySetInnerHTML: {
23:23:28.504   __html: css
23:23:28.504   }
23:23:28.504   });
23:23:28.504   });
23:23:28.504   }
23:23:28.504   var StyleSheetRegistry = /*#__PURE__*/ function() {
23:23:28.504   function StyleSheetRegistry(param) {
23:23:28.504   var ref = param === void 0 ? {} : param, _styleSheet = ref.styleSheet, styleSheet = _styleSheet === void 0 ? null : _styleSheet, _optimizeForSpeed = ref.optimizeForSpeed, optimizeForSpeed = _optimizeForSpeed === void 0 ? false : _optimizeForSpeed;
23:23:28.504   this._sheet = styleSheet || new StyleSheet({
23:23:28.504   name: "styled-jsx",
23:23:28.504   optimizeForSpeed: optimizeForSpeed
23:23:28.504   });
23:23:28.504   this._sheet.inject();
23:23:28.504   if (styleSheet && typeof optimizeForSpeed === "boolean") {
23:23:28.504   this._sheet.setOptimizeForSpeed(optimizeForSpeed);
23:23:28.504   this._optimizeForSpeed = this._sheet.isOptimizeForSpeed();
23:23:28.504   }
23:23:28.504   this._fromServer = undefined;
23:23:28.504   this._indices = {};
23:23:28.504   this._instancesCounts = {};
23:23:28.504   }
23:23:28.504   var _proto = StyleSheetRegistry.prototype;
23:23:28.504   _proto.add = function add(props) {
23:23:28.504   var _this = this;
23:23:28.504   if (undefined === this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:28.505   this._optimizeForSpeed = Array.isArray(props.children);
23:23:28.505   this._sheet.setOptimizeForSpeed(this._optimizeForSpeed);
23:23:28.505   this._optimizeForSpeed = this._sheet.isOptimizeForSpeed();
23:23:28.505   }
23:23:28.505   if (typeof window !== "undefined" && !this._fromServer) {
23:23:28.505   this._fromServer = this.selectFromServer();
23:23:28.505   this._instancesCounts = Object.keys(this._fromServer).reduce(function(acc, tagName) {
23:23:28.505   acc[tagName] = 0;
23:23:28.505   return acc;
23:23:28.505   }, {});
23:23:28.505   }
23:23:28.505   var ref = this.getIdAndRules(props), styleId = ref.styleId, rules = ref.rules;
23:23:28.505   // Deduping: just increase the instances count.
23:23:28.505   if (styleId in this._instancesCounts) {
23:23:28.505   this._instancesCounts[styleId] += 1;
23:23:28.505   return;
23:23:28.505   }
23:23:28.505   var indices = rules.map(function(rule) {
23:23:28.505   return _this._sheet.insertRule(rule);
23:23:28.505   }) // Filter out invalid rules
23:23:28.505   .filter(function(index) {
23:23:28.505   return index !== -1;
23:23:28.505   });
23:23:28.505   this._indices[styleId] = indices;
23:23:28.505   this._instancesCounts[styleId] = 1;
23:23:28.505   };
23:23:28.505   _proto.remove = function remove(props) {
23:23:28.505   var _this = this;
23:23:28.506   var styleId = this.getIdAndRules(props).styleId;
23:23:28.506   invariant(styleId in this._instancesCounts, "styleId: `" + styleId + "` not found");
23:23:28.506   this._instancesCounts[styleId] -= 1;
23:23:28.506   if (this._instancesCounts[styleId] < 1) {
23:23:28.506   var tagFromServer = this._fromServer && this._fromServer[styleId];
23:23:28.506   if (tagFromServer) {
23:23:28.506   tagFromServer.parentNode.removeChild(tagFromServer);
23:23:28.506   delete this._fromServer[styleId];
23:23:28.506   } else {
23:23:28.506   this._indices[styleId].forEach(function(index) {
23:23:28.506   return _this._sheet.deleteRule(index);
23:23:28.506   });
23:23:28.506   delete this._indices[styleId];
23:23:28.506   }
23:23:28.506   delete this._instancesCounts[styleId];
23:23:28.506   }
23:23:28.506   };
23:23:28.507   _proto.update = function update(props, nextProps) {
23:23:28.507   this.add(nextProps);
23:23:28.507   this.remove(props);
23:23:28.507   };
23:23:28.507   _proto.flush = function flush() {
23:23:28.507   this._sheet.flush();
23:23:28.507   this._sheet.inject();
23:23:28.507   this._fromServer = undefined;
23:23:28.507   this._indices = {};
23:23:28.507   this._instancesCounts = {};
23:23:28.507   };
23:23:28.507   _proto.cssRules = function cssRules() {
23:23:28.507   var _this = this;
23:23:28.507   var fromServer = this._fromServer ? Object.keys(this._fromServer).map(function(styleId) {
23:23:28.507   return [
23:23:28.507   styleId,
23:23:28.507   _this._fromServer[styleId]
23:23:28.507   ];
23:23:28.507   }) : [];
23:23:28.507   var cssRules = this._sheet.cssRules();
23:23:28.507   return fromServer.concat(Object.keys(this._indices).map(function(styleId) {
23:23:28.507   return [
23:23:28.507   styleId,
23:23:28.507   _this._indices[styleId].map(function(index) {
23:23:28.507   return cssRules[index].cssText;
23:23:28.507   }).join(_this._optimizeForSpeed ? "" : "\n")
23:23:28.507   ];
23:23:28.507   }) // filter out empty rules
23:23:28.507   .filter(function(rule) {
23:23:28.507   return Boolean(rule[1]);
23:23:28.507   }));
23:23:28.507   };
23:23:28.507   _proto.styles = function styles(options) {
23:23:28.507   return mapRulesToStyle(this.cssRules(), options);
23:23:28.507   };
23:23:28.507   _proto.getIdAndRules = function getIdAndRules(props) {
23:23:28.507   var css = props.children, dynamic = props.dynamic, id = props.id;
23:23:28.507   if (dynamic) {
23:23:28.507   var styleId = computeId(id, dynamic);
23:23:28.507   return {
23:23:28.508   styleId: styleId,
23:23:28.508   rules: Array.isArray(css) ? css.map(function(rule) {
23:23:28.508   return computeSelector(styleId, rule);
23:23:28.508   }) : [
23:23:28.508   computeSelector(styleId, css)
23:23:28.508   ]
23:23:28.508   };
23:23:28.508   }
23:23:28.508   return {
23:23:28.508   styleId: computeId(id),
23:23:28.508   rules: Array.isArray(css) ? css : [
23:23:28.508   css
23:23:28.508   ]
23:23:28.508   };
23:23:28.508   };
23:23:28.509   /**
23:23:28.509      * selectFromServer
23:23:28.509      *
23:23:28.509      * Collects style tags from the document with id __jsx-XXX
23:23:28.509      */ _proto.selectFromServer = function selectFromServer() {
23:23:28.509   var elements = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('[id^="__jsx-"]'));
23:23:28.509   return elements.reduce(function(acc, element) {
23:23:28.509   var id = element.id.slice(2);
23:23:28.509   acc[id] = element;
23:23:28.509   return acc;
23:23:28.509   }, {});
23:23:28.509   };
23:23:28.509   return StyleSheetRegistry;
23:23:28.509   }();
23:23:28.509   function invariant(condition, message) {
23:23:28.509   if (!condition) {
23:23:28.509   throw new Error("StyleSheetRegistry: " + message + ".");
23:23:28.509   }
23:23:28.509   }
23:23:28.509   var StyleSheetContext = /*#__PURE__*/ React.createContext(null);
23:23:28.509   StyleSheetContext.displayName = "StyleSheetContext";
23:23:28.509   function createStyleRegistry() {
23:23:28.509   return new StyleSheetRegistry();
23:23:28.509   }
23:23:28.509   function StyleRegistry(param) {
23:23:28.509   var configuredRegistry = param.registry, children = param.children;
23:23:28.509   var rootRegistry = React.useContext(StyleSheetContext);
23:23:28.509   var ref = React.useState(function() {
23:23:28.509   return rootRegistry || configuredRegistry || createStyleRegistry();
23:23:28.509   }), registry = ref[0];
23:23:28.509   return /*#__PURE__*/ React__default["default"].createElement(StyleSheetContext.Provider, {
23:23:28.509   value: registry
23:23:28.509   }, children);
23:23:28.509   }
23:23:28.509   function useStyleRegistry() {
23:23:28.509   return React.useContext(StyleSheetContext);
23:23:28.509   }
23:23:28.509   // Opt-into the new `useInsertionEffect` API in React 18, fallback to `useLayoutEffect`.
23:23:28.509   // https://github.com/reactwg/react-18/discussions/110
23:23:28.510   var useInsertionEffect = React__default["default"].useInsertionEffect || React__default["default"].useLayoutEffect;
23:23:28.510   var defaultRegistry = typeof window !== "undefined" ? createStyleRegistry() : undefined;
23:23:28.510   function JSXStyle(props) {
23:23:28.510   var registry = defaultRegistry ? defaultRegistry : useStyleRegistry();
23:23:28.510   // If `registry` does not exist, we do nothing here.
23:23:28.510   if (!registry) {
23:23:28.510   return null;
23:23:28.510   }
23:23:28.510   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:28.510   registry.add(props);
23:23:28.510   return null;
23:23:28.510   }
23:23:28.510   useInsertionEffect(function() {
23:23:28.510   registry.add(props);
23:23:28.510   return function() {
23:23:28.510   registry.remove(props);
23:23:28.510   };
23:23:28.510   // props.children can be string[], will be striped since id is identical
23:23:28.510   }, [
23:23:28.510   props.id,
23:23:28.510   String(props.dynamic)
23:23:28.510   ]);
23:23:28.510   return null;
23:23:28.510   }
23:23:28.510   JSXStyle.dynamic = function(info) {
23:23:28.510   return info.map(function(tagInfo) {
23:23:28.510   var baseId = tagInfo[0];
23:23:28.511   var props = tagInfo[1];
23:23:28.511   return computeId(baseId, props);
23:23:28.511   }).join(" ");
23:23:28.511   };
23:23:28.511   exports.StyleRegistry = StyleRegistry;
23:23:28.511   exports.createStyleRegistry = createStyleRegistry;
23:23:28.511   exports.style = JSXStyle;
23:23:28.511   exports.useStyleRegistry = useStyleRegistry;
23:23:28.511   }),
23:23:28.511   437902, ((__turbopack_context__, module, exports) => {
23:23:28.511   
23:23:28.511   module.exports = __turbopack_context__.r(898547).style;
23:23:28.511   }),

23:23:28.521   function NotificationToast({ toasts, onRemove }) {
23:23:28.521   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("div", {
23:23:28.521   className: " pointer-events-none fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 space-y-2 sm:top-6 sm:right-6 ",
23:23:28.521   children: toasts.map((t)=>/*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(Toast, {
23:23:28.521   toast: t,
23:23:28.521   onRemove: onRemove
23:23:28.521   }, t.id))
23:23:28.521   });
23:23:28.521   }
23:23:28.521   function Toast({ toast, onRemove }) {
23:23:28.521   const [isExiting, setIsExiting] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__1["useState"])(false);
23:23:28.521   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__1["useEffect"])(()=>{
23:23:28.521   if (!toast.duration) return;
23:23:28.522   const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
23:23:28.522   setIsExiting(true);
23:23:28.522   setTimeout(()=>onRemove(toast.id), 300);
23:23:28.522   }, toast.duration);
23:23:28.522   return ()=>clearTimeout(timer);
23:23:28.522   }, [
23:23:28.522   toast.duration,
23:23:28.522   toast.id,
23:23:28.522   onRemove
23:23:28.522   ]);
23:23:28.522   const baseClasses = `
23:23:28.522       pointer-events-auto
23:23:28.522       flex items-start gap-3
23:23:28.522       rounded-lg border
23:23:28.522       px-4 py-3
23:23:28.522       shadow-lg backdrop-blur
23:23:28.522       transition-all duration-300
23:23:28.522       animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2
23:23:28.522       sm:px-5 sm:py-4
23:23:28.522     `;
23:23:28.522   const typeClasses = {
23:23:28.522   success: 'border-green-500/50 bg-green-950/80 text-green-300',
23:23:28.522   error: 'border-red-500/50 bg-red-950/80 text-red-300',
23:23:28.522   warning: 'border-blue-500/50 bg-blue-950/80 text-blue-300',
23:23:28.522   info: 'border-cyan-500/50 bg-cyan-950/80 text-cyan-300'
23:23:28.522   };
23:23:28.522   const iconProps = {
23:23:28.522   className: 'h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5'
23:23:28.522   };
23:23:28.522   const icons = {
23:23:28.522   success: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__406321__["default"], {
23:23:28.522   ...iconProps
23:23:28.522   }),
23:23:28.522   error: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__1["AlertCircle"], {
23:23:28.522   ...iconProps
23:23:28.522   }),
23:23:28.522   warning: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__1["AlertCircle"], {
23:23:28.522   ...iconProps
23:23:28.522   }),
23:23:28.522   info: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__952571__["Info"], {
23:23:28.522   ...iconProps
23:23:28.522   })
23:23:28.523   };
23:23:28.523   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.523   className: `
23:23:28.523           ${baseClasses}
23:23:28.523           ${typeClasses[toast.type]}
23:23:28.523           ${isExiting ? 'slide-out-to-top-2 opacity-0' : ''}
23:23:28.523         `,
23:23:28.523   children: [
23:23:28.523   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("div", {
23:23:28.523   className: "flex-shrink-0",
23:23:28.523   children: icons[toast.type]
23:23:28.523   }),
23:23:28.523   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.523   className: " flex-1 text-sm sm:text-base ",
23:23:28.523   children: [
23:23:28.523   toast.message,
23:23:28.523   toast.subtitle && /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("p", {
23:23:28.523   className: "mt-1 text-xs opacity-80",
23:23:28.523   children: toast.subtitle
23:23:28.523   })
23:23:28.523   ]
23:23:28.523   }),
23:23:28.523   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("button", {
23:23:28.523   onClick: ()=>{
23:23:28.523   setIsExiting(true);
23:23:28.523   setTimeout(()=>onRemove(toast.id), 300);
23:23:28.523   },
23:23:28.523   className: " flex-shrink-0 text-current opacity-60 transition-opacity hover:opacity-100 ",
23:23:28.523   "aria-label": "Cerrar",
23:23:28.523   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__37727__["X"], {
23:23:28.524   className: "size-4"
23:23:28.524   })
23:23:28.524   })
23:23:28.524   ]
23:23:28.524   });
23:23:28.524   }
23:23:28.524   'use client';
23:23:28.524   ;
23:23:28.524   ;
23:23:28.524   ;
23:23:28.524   ;
23:23:28.524   ;
23:23:28.524   ;
23:23:28.524   function BuscarSuscripcionPage() {
23:23:28.524   const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('');
23:23:28.524   const [searchType, setSearchType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('email');
23:23:28.524   const [loading, setLoading] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(false);
23:23:28.524   const [actionType, setActionType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
23:23:28.524   const [result, setResult] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
23:23:28.524   const [error, setError] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
23:23:28.524   const [esp32Message, setEsp32Message] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
23:23:28.524   const [esp32MessageType, setEsp32MessageType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('success');
23:23:28.524   const [toasts, setToasts] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])([]);
23:23:28.524   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useEffect"])(()=>{
23:23:28.524   document.body.classList.add('no-chrome');
23:23:28.524   document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
23:23:28.524   return ()=>{
23:23:28.524   document.body.classList.remove('no-chrome');
23:23:28.524   document.body.style.overflow = '';
23:23:28.524   };
23:23:28.524   }, []);
23:23:28.524   const addToast = (message, type, duration = 5000, subtitle)=>{
23:23:28.524   const id = `toast-${Date.now()}`;
23:23:28.524   setToasts((prev)=>[
23:23:28.524   ...prev,
23:23:28.524   {
23:23:28.524   id,
23:23:28.524   message,
23:23:28.524   type,
23:23:28.524   duration,
23:23:28.524   subtitle
23:23:28.524   }
23:23:28.524   ]);
23:23:28.524   };
23:23:28.524   const removeToast = (id)=>{
23:23:28.524   setToasts((prev)=>prev.filter((t)=>t.id !== id));
23:23:28.525   };
23:23:28.525   // Limpiar resultado después de 5 segundos de completar la acción
23:23:28.525   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useEffect"])(()=>{
23:23:28.525   if (result && !loading) {
23:23:28.525   const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
23:23:28.525   setResult(null);
23:23:28.525   setSearchTerm('');
23:23:28.525   setEsp32Message(null);
23:23:28.525   }, 5000);
23:23:28.525   return ()=>clearTimeout(timer);
23:23:28.525   }
23:23:28.525   }, [
23:23:28.526   result,
23:23:28.526   loading
23:23:28.526   ]);
23:23:28.526   const handleRegister = async ()=>{
23:23:28.526   if (!searchTerm.trim()) {
23:23:28.526   setError('Por favor ingresa un término de búsqueda');
23:23:28.526   return;
23:23:28.526   }
23:23:28.526   setLoading(true);
23:23:28.526   setError(null);
23:23:28.526   setResult(null);
23:23:28.526   setEsp32Message(null);
23:23:28.526   try {
23:23:28.526   // Paso 1: Buscar usuario
23:23:28.526   const searchResponse = await fetch('/api/super-admin/search-user', {
23:23:28.526   method: 'POST',
23:23:28.526   headers: {
23:23:28.526   'Content-Type': 'application/json'
23:23:28.526   },
23:23:28.526   body: JSON.stringify({
23:23:28.526   searchTerm: searchTerm.trim(),
23:23:28.526   searchType
23:23:28.526   })
23:23:28.526   });
23:23:28.526   const searchData = await searchResponse.json();
23:23:28.526   if (!searchResponse.ok) {
23:23:28.526   const errorMessage = typeof searchData === 'object' && searchData !== null && 'error' in searchData ? searchData.error : 'Error en la búsqueda';
23:23:28.526   throw new Error(errorMessage);
23:23:28.526   }
23:23:28.526   if (typeof searchData !== 'object' || searchData === null || !('found' in searchData)) {
23:23:28.526   throw new Error('Respuesta inválida del servidor');
23:23:28.526   }
23:23:28.526   const searchResult = searchData;
23:23:28.526   if (!searchResult.found) {
23:23:28.526   setResult(searchResult);
23:23:28.526   addToast('Usuario no encontrado', 'error', 4000, 'Verifica email, documento o nombre');
23:23:28.526   return;
23:23:28.526   }
23:23:28.526   // Usuario encontrado
23:23:28.526   setResult(searchResult);
23:23:28.526   const userId = searchResult.user?.id;
23:23:28.526   if (!userId) {
23:23:28.527   throw new Error('ID de usuario no disponible');
23:23:28.527   }
23:23:28.527   // Determinar si es entrada o salida
23:23:28.527   const type = searchResult.user?.hasOpenEntry ? 'exit' : 'entry';
23:23:28.527   setActionType(type);
23:23:28.527   // Paso 2: Registrar entrada o salida
23:23:28.527   const registerResponse = await fetch('/api/super-admin/register-access', {
23:23:28.527   method: 'POST',
23:23:28.527   headers: {
23:23:28.527   'Content-Type': 'application/json'
23:23:28.527   },
23:23:28.527   body: JSON.stringify({
23:23:28.527   userId,
23:23:28.527   action: type
23:23:28.527   })
23:23:28.527   });
23:23:28.527   const registerData = await registerResponse.json();
23:23:28.527   if (!registerResponse.ok) {
23:23:28.527   const errorMsg = typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'error' in registerData ? registerData.error : 'Error al registrar';
23:23:28.527   const errorDetails = typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'details' in registerData ? registerData.details : '';
23:23:28.527   setEsp32MessageType('error');
23:23:28.527   setEsp32Message(`⚠ ${errorMsg}`);
23:23:28.527   addToast(`Error: ${errorMsg}`, 'error', 6000, errorDetails);
23:23:28.527   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
23:23:28.527   return;
23:23:28.527   }
23:23:28.527   // Procesar respuesta exitosa
23:23:28.527   if (typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'success' in registerData && registerData.success) {
23:23:28.528   const data = registerData;
23:23:28.528   // Manejo de respuesta ESP32
23:23:28.528   if (data.esp32?.ok) {
23:23:28.528   setEsp32MessageType('success');
23:23:28.528   setEsp32Message(type === 'entry' ? '✓ Entrada registrada - Puerta abierta' : '✓ Salida registrada - Puerta abierta');
23:23:28.528   addToast(data.message, 'success', 5000, 'ESP32: Activo • Acceso permitido');
23:23:28.528   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 5000);
23:23:28.528   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'timeout') {
23:23:28.528   setEsp32MessageType('error');
23:23:28.528   setEsp32Message('⚠ Timeout: ESP32 no responde');
23:23:28.528   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'warning' : 'error', 6000, 'ESP32: Timeout (5000ms)');
23:23:28.528   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
23:23:28.528   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'error') {
23:23:28.528   setEsp32MessageType('error');
23:23:28.528   setEsp32Message('⚠ Error conectando a ESP32');
23:23:28.528   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'warning' : 'error', 6000, 'ESP32: Error de conexión');
23:23:28.528   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
23:23:28.528   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'not_configured') {
23:23:28.528   setEsp32MessageType('warning');
23:23:28.528   setEsp32Message('ℹ ESP32 no configurado');
23:23:28.528   addToast(data.message, 'warning', 4000, 'ESP32: No configurado');
23:23:28.528   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 4000);
23:23:28.528   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'inactive') {
23:23:28.528   setEsp32MessageType('warning');
23:23:28.528   setEsp32Message(type === 'exit' ? '✓ Salida registrada (suscripción inactiva)' : '⚠ Suscripción inactiva');
23:23:28.528   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'success' : 'warning', 5000, type === 'exit' ? 'Salida permitida sin ESP32' : 'Acceso denegado');
23:23:28.528   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 5000);
23:23:28.528   } else {
23:23:28.528   setEsp32MessageType('success');
23:23:28.528   setEsp32Message(`✓ ${type === 'entry' ? 'Entrada' : 'Salida'} registrada`);
23:23:28.528   addToast(data.message, 'success', 4000);
23:23:28.528   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 4000);
23:23:28.528   }
23:23:28.528   }
23:23:28.528   } catch (err) {
23:23:28.528   const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Error al registrar acceso';
23:23:28.528   setError(errorMsg);
23:23:28.528   addToast('Error al registrar acceso', 'error', 5000, errorMsg);
23:23:28.528   } finally{
23:23:28.528   setLoading(false);
23:23:28.528   setActionType(null);
23:23:28.528   }
23:23:28.528   };
23:23:28.528   const renderResult = ()=>{
23:23:28.528   if (!result) return null;
23:23:28.529   if (!result.found) {
23:23:28.529   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("div", {
23:23:28.529   className: " xs:mt-5 xs:p-4 mt-4 rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 bg-red-950/20 p-3 sm:mt-6 sm:p-6 ",
23:23:28.529   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.529   className: " xs:gap-3 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:gap-4 ",
23:23:28.529   children: [
23:23:28.529   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__["AlertCircle"], {
23:23:28.529   className: " xs:h-6 xs:w-6 size-5 flex-shrink-0 text-red-400 sm:size-6 "
23:23:28.529   }),
23:23:28.529   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.529   className: "flex-1",
23:23:28.529   children: [
23:23:28.529   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
23:23:28.529   className: " xs:text-base text-sm font-semibold text-red-400 sm:text-lg ",
23:23:28.529   children: "Usuario no encontrado"
23:23:28.529   }),
23:23:28.529   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("p", {
23:23:28.529   className: " xs:text-xs mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400 sm:text-sm ",
23:23:28.529   children: result.message ?? 'No se encontró ningún usuario con los datos proporcionados'
23:23:28.529   })
23:23:28.529   ]
23:23:28.529   })
23:23:28.529   ]
23:23:28.529   })
23:23:28.529   });
23:23:28.529   }
23:23:28.529   const { user } = result;
23:23:28.529   const isActive = user?.subscriptionStatus === 'active';
23:23:28.530   const daysRemaining = user?.daysRemaining ?? 0;
23:23:28.530   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.530   className: " xs:mt-5 xs:space-y-3 mt-4 space-y-2 sm:mt-6 sm:space-y-4 md:space-y-5 ",
23:23:28.530   children: [
23:23:28.530   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.530   className: " xs:p-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-700 bg-gray-800/50 p-3 sm:p-6 ",
23:23:28.530   children: [
23:23:28.530   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
23:23:28.530   className: " xs:mb-3 xs:text-lg mb-2 text-base font-bold text-cyan-400 sm:mb-4 sm:text-xl ",
23:23:28.530   children: "Información del Usuario"
23:23:28.530   }),
23:23:28.530   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.530   className: " xs:space-y-2 xs:text-sm space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-300 sm:text-base ",
23:23:28.530   children: [
23:23:28.530   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("p", {
23:23:28.530   className: "break-words",
23:23:28.530   children: [
23:23:28.530   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("span", {
23:23:28.530   className: "font-semibold text-gray-400",
23:23:28.530   children: "Nombre:"
23:23:28.530   }),
23:23:28.530   ' ',
23:23:28.530   user?.name ?? 'N/A'
23:23:28.530   ]
23:23:28.531   }),
23:23:28.531   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("p", {
23:23:28.531   className: "break-all",
23:23:28.531   children: [
23:23:28.531   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("span", {
23:23:28.531   className: "font-semibold text-gray-400",
23:23:28.531   children: "Email:"
23:23:28.531   }),
23:23:28.531   ' ',
23:23:28.531   user?.email
23:23:28.531   ]
23:23:28.531   }),
23:23:28.531   user?.document && /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("p", {
23:23:28.531   className: "break-all",
23:23:28.531   children: [
23:23:28.531   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("span", {
23:23:28.531   className: "font-semibold text-gray-400",
23:23:28.531   children: "Documento:"
23:23:28.531   }),
23:23:28.531   ' ',
23:23:28.531   user.document
23:23:28.531   ]
23:23:28.531   })
23:23:28.531   ]
23:23:28.531   })
23:23:28.531   ]
23:23:28.531   }),
23:23:28.531   isActive ? /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("div", {
23:23:28.531   className: " xs:p-4 rounded-lg border border-green-500/30 bg-green-950/20 p-3 sm:p-6 ",
23:23:28.531   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.531   className: " xs:gap-3 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-start sm:gap-4 ",
23:23:28.531   children: [
23:23:28.531   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__406321__["default"], {
23:23:28.531   className: " xs:h-6 xs:w-6 size-5 flex-shrink-0 text-green-400 sm:size-6 "
23:23:28.531   }),
23:23:28.531   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.531   className: "flex-1",
23:23:28.531   children: [
23:23:28.531   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
23:23:28.532   className: " xs:mb-2 xs:text-base mb-2 text-sm font-semibold text-green-400 sm:text-lg ",
23:23:28.532   children: "Suscripción Activa"
23:23:28.532   }),
23:23:28.532   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.532   className: " xs:space-y-2 xs:text-sm space-y-1.5 text-xs text-gray-300 sm:text-base ",
23:23:28.532   children: [
23:23:28.532   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:28.532   className: "flex items-center gap-2",
23:23:28.532   children: [
23:23:28.532   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__503116__["Clock"], {
23:23:28.532   className: " xs:h-4 xs:w-4 size-3.5 flex-shrink-0 text-cyan-400 sm:size-5 "
23:23:28.532   }),
23:23:28.532   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("span", {
23:23:28.532   className: " xs:text-xs text-xs sm:text-sm ",
23:23:28.532   children: [
23:23:28.532   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("span", {
23:23:28.532   className: "font-semibold text-cyan-400",
23:23:28.532   children: daysRemaining
23:23:28.532   }),
23:23:28.532   ' ',
23:23:28.532   daysRemaining === 1 ? 'día restante' : 'días restantes'
23:23:28.532   ]
23:23:28.532   })
23:23:28.532   ]
23:23:28.532   }),
23:23:28.532   user?.subscriptionEndDate && /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("p", {
23:23:28.532   className: " xs:text-xs text-xs text-gray-400 sm:text-sm ",
23:23:28.532   children: [
23:23:28.532   "Vence el:",
23:23:28.532   ' ',
23:23:28.532   new Date(user.subscriptionEndDate).toLocaleDateString('es-ES', {
23:23:28.532   year: 'numeric',
23:23:28.532   month: 'long',
23:23:28.532   day: 'numeric'
23:23:28.532   })
23:23:28.532   ]
23:23:28.532   })
23:23:28.532   ]
23:23:28.532   }),
23:23:28.532   esp32Message && /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("div", {
23:23:28.532   className: `
23:23:28.533                         xs:mt-2.5 xs:p-2.5
23:23:28.533                         mt-2 rounded border p-2
23:23:28.533                         sm:mt-3 sm:p-3
23:23:28.533                         ${esp32MessageType === 'success' ? 'border-green-500/30 bg-green-950/20' : esp32MessageType === 'warning' ? 'border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-950/20' : 'border-red-500/30 bg-red-950/20'}
23:23:28.533                       `,
23:23:28.533   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("p", {
23:23:28.533   className: `
23:23:28.533                           text-xs
23:23:28.533                           ${esp32MessageType === 'success' ? 'text-green-300' : esp32MessageType === 'warning' ? 'text-blue-300' : 'text-red-300'}
23:23:28.533                         `,
23:23:28.533   children: esp32Message
23:23:28.533   })
23:23:28.533   })

23:23:29.641   898547, ((__turbopack_context__, module, exports) => {
23:23:29.641   
23:23:29.641   var __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__ = /*#__PURE__*/ __turbopack_context__.i(247167);
23:23:29.641   __turbopack_context__.r(516015);
23:23:29.641   var React = __turbopack_context__.r(271645);
23:23:29.641   function _interopDefaultLegacy(e) {
23:23:29.641   return e && typeof e === 'object' && 'default' in e ? e : {
23:23:29.641   'default': e
23:23:29.641   };
23:23:29.641   }
23:23:29.641   var React__default = /*#__PURE__*/ _interopDefaultLegacy(React);
23:23:29.641   /*
23:23:29.641   Based on Glamor's sheet
23:23:29.641   https://github.com/threepointone/glamor/blob/667b480d31b3721a905021b26e1290ce92ca2879/src/sheet.js
23:23:29.641   */ function _defineProperties(target, props) {
23:23:29.641   for(var i = 0; i < props.length; i++){
23:23:29.641   var descriptor = props[i];
23:23:29.641   descriptor.enumerable = descriptor.enumerable || false;
23:23:29.641   descriptor.configurable = true;
23:23:29.641   if ("value" in descriptor) descriptor.writable = true;
23:23:29.641   Object.defineProperty(target, descriptor.key, descriptor);
23:23:29.641   }
23:23:29.641   }
23:23:29.641   function _createClass(Constructor, protoProps, staticProps) {
23:23:29.641   if (protoProps) _defineProperties(Constructor.prototype, protoProps);
23:23:29.641   if (staticProps) _defineProperties(Constructor, staticProps);
23:23:29.642   return Constructor;
23:23:29.642   }
23:23:29.642   var isProd = typeof __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__["default"] !== "undefined" && __TURBOPACK__imported__module__247167__["default"].env && ("TURBOPACK compile-time value", "production") === "production";
23:23:29.642   var isString = function(o) {
23:23:29.642   return Object.prototype.toString.call(o) === "[object String]";
23:23:29.642   };
23:23:29.642   var StyleSheet = /*#__PURE__*/ function() {
23:23:29.642   function StyleSheet(param) {
23:23:29.642   var ref = param === void 0 ? {} : param, _name = ref.name, name = _name === void 0 ? "stylesheet" : _name, _optimizeForSpeed = ref.optimizeForSpeed, optimizeForSpeed = _optimizeForSpeed === void 0 ? isProd : _optimizeForSpeed;
23:23:29.642   invariant$1(isString(name), "`name` must be a string");
23:23:29.642   this._name = name;
23:23:29.642   this._deletedRulePlaceholder = "#" + name + "-deleted-rule____{}";
23:23:29.642   invariant$1(typeof optimizeForSpeed === "boolean", "`optimizeForSpeed` must be a boolean");
23:23:29.642   this._optimizeForSpeed = optimizeForSpeed;
23:23:29.642   this._serverSheet = undefined;
23:23:29.642   this._tags = [];
23:23:29.642   this._injected = false;
23:23:29.642   this._rulesCount = 0;
23:23:29.642   var node = typeof window !== "undefined" && document.querySelector('meta[property="csp-nonce"]');
23:23:29.642   this._nonce = node ? node.getAttribute("content") : null;
23:23:29.642   }
23:23:29.642   var _proto = StyleSheet.prototype;
23:23:29.642   _proto.setOptimizeForSpeed = function setOptimizeForSpeed(bool) {
23:23:29.643   invariant$1(typeof bool === "boolean", "`setOptimizeForSpeed` accepts a boolean");
23:23:29.643   invariant$1(this._rulesCount === 0, "optimizeForSpeed cannot be when rules have already been inserted");
23:23:29.643   this.flush();
23:23:29.643   this._optimizeForSpeed = bool;
23:23:29.643   this.inject();
23:23:29.643   };
23:23:29.643   _proto.isOptimizeForSpeed = function isOptimizeForSpeed() {
23:23:29.643   return this._optimizeForSpeed;
23:23:29.643   };
23:23:29.643   _proto.inject = function inject() {
23:23:29.643   var _this = this;
23:23:29.643   invariant$1(!this._injected, "sheet already injected");
23:23:29.643   this._injected = true;
23:23:29.643   if (typeof window !== "undefined" && this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:29.643   this._tags[0] = this.makeStyleTag(this._name);
23:23:29.643   this._optimizeForSpeed = "insertRule" in this.getSheet();
23:23:29.643   if (!this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:29.643   if (!isProd) {
23:23:29.643   console.warn("StyleSheet: optimizeForSpeed mode not supported falling back to standard mode.");
23:23:29.643   }
23:23:29.643   this.flush();
23:23:29.643   this._injected = true;
23:23:29.643   }
23:23:29.643   return;
23:23:29.643   }
23:23:29.643   this._serverSheet = {
23:23:29.643   cssRules: [],
23:23:29.643   insertRule: function(rule, index) {
23:23:29.643   if (typeof index === "number") {
23:23:29.643   _this._serverSheet.cssRules[index] = {
23:23:29.644   cssText: rule
23:23:29.644   };
23:23:29.644   } else {
23:23:29.644   _this._serverSheet.cssRules.push({
23:23:29.644   cssText: rule
23:23:29.644   });
23:23:29.644   }
23:23:29.644   return index;
23:23:29.644   },
23:23:29.644   deleteRule: function(index) {
23:23:29.644   _this._serverSheet.cssRules[index] = null;
23:23:29.644   }
23:23:29.644   };
23:23:29.644   };
23:23:29.644   _proto.getSheetForTag = function getSheetForTag(tag) {
23:23:29.644   if (tag.sheet) {
23:23:29.644   return tag.sheet;
23:23:29.644   }
23:23:29.644   // this weirdness brought to you by firefox
23:23:29.644   for(var i = 0; i < document.styleSheets.length; i++){
23:23:29.644   if (document.styleSheets[i].ownerNode === tag) {
23:23:29.644   return document.styleSheets[i];
23:23:29.644   }
23:23:29.644   }
23:23:29.644   };
23:23:29.644   _proto.getSheet = function getSheet() {
23:23:29.644   return this.getSheetForTag(this._tags[this._tags.length - 1]);
23:23:29.644   };
23:23:29.644   _proto.insertRule = function insertRule(rule, index) {
23:23:29.644   invariant$1(isString(rule), "`insertRule` accepts only strings");
23:23:29.644   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:29.644   if (typeof index !== "number") {
23:23:29.644   index = this._serverSheet.cssRules.length;
23:23:29.645   }
23:23:29.645   this._serverSheet.insertRule(rule, index);
23:23:29.645   return this._rulesCount++;
23:23:29.645   }
23:23:29.645   if (this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:29.645   var sheet = this.getSheet();
23:23:29.645   if (typeof index !== "number") {
23:23:29.645   index = sheet.cssRules.length;
23:23:29.645   }
23:23:29.645   // this weirdness for perf, and chrome's weird bug
23:23:29.645   // https://stackoverflow.com/questions/20007992/chrome-suddenly-stopped-accepting-insertrule
23:23:29.645   try {
23:23:29.645   sheet.insertRule(rule, index);
23:23:29.645   } catch (error) {
23:23:29.645   if (!isProd) {
23:23:29.645   console.warn("StyleSheet: illegal rule: \n\n" + rule + "\n\nSee https://stackoverflow.com/q/20007992 for more info");
23:23:29.645   }
23:23:29.645   return -1;
23:23:29.645   }
23:23:29.645   } else {
23:23:29.645   var insertionPoint = this._tags[index];
23:23:29.645   this._tags.push(this.makeStyleTag(this._name, rule, insertionPoint));
23:23:29.645   }
23:23:29.645   return this._rulesCount++;
23:23:29.645   };
23:23:29.645   _proto.replaceRule = function replaceRule(index, rule) {
23:23:29.645   if (this._optimizeForSpeed || typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:29.645   var sheet = typeof window !== "undefined" ? this.getSheet() : this._serverSheet;
23:23:29.646   if (!rule.trim()) {
23:23:29.646   rule = this._deletedRulePlaceholder;
23:23:29.646   }
23:23:29.646   if (!sheet.cssRules[index]) {
23:23:29.646   // @TBD Should we throw an error?
23:23:29.646   return index;
23:23:29.646   }
23:23:29.646   sheet.deleteRule(index);
23:23:29.646   try {
23:23:29.646   sheet.insertRule(rule, index);
23:23:29.646   } catch (error) {
23:23:29.646   if (!isProd) {
23:23:29.646   console.warn("StyleSheet: illegal rule: \n\n" + rule + "\n\nSee https://stackoverflow.com/q/20007992 for more info");
23:23:29.646   }
23:23:29.646   // In order to preserve the indices we insert a deleteRulePlaceholder
23:23:29.646   sheet.insertRule(this._deletedRulePlaceholder, index);
23:23:29.646   }
23:23:29.646   } else {
23:23:29.646   var tag = this._tags[index];
23:23:29.646   invariant$1(tag, "old rule at index `" + index + "` not found");
23:23:29.646   tag.textContent = rule;
23:23:29.646   }
23:23:29.646   return index;
23:23:29.646   };
23:23:29.646   _proto.deleteRule = function deleteRule(index) {
23:23:29.646   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:29.646   this._serverSheet.deleteRule(index);
23:23:29.646   return;
23:23:29.646   }
23:23:29.646   if (this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:29.647   this.replaceRule(index, "");
23:23:29.647   } else {
23:23:29.647   var tag = this._tags[index];
23:23:29.647   invariant$1(tag, "rule at index `" + index + "` not found");
23:23:29.647   tag.parentNode.removeChild(tag);
23:23:29.647   this._tags[index] = null;
23:23:29.647   }
23:23:29.647   };
23:23:29.647   _proto.flush = function flush() {
23:23:29.647   this._injected = false;
23:23:29.647   this._rulesCount = 0;
23:23:29.647   if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
23:23:29.647   this._tags.forEach(function(tag) {
23:23:29.647   return tag && tag.parentNode.removeChild(tag);
23:23:29.647   });
23:23:29.647   this._tags = [];
23:23:29.647   } else {
23:23:29.647   // simpler on server
23:23:29.647   this._serverSheet.cssRules = [];
23:23:29.647   }
23:23:29.647   };
23:23:29.647   _proto.cssRules = function cssRules() {
23:23:29.647   var _this = this;
23:23:29.647   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:29.647   return this._serverSheet.cssRules;
23:23:29.647   }
23:23:29.647   return this._tags.reduce(function(rules, tag) {
23:23:29.647   if (tag) {
23:23:29.647   rules = rules.concat(Array.prototype.map.call(_this.getSheetForTag(tag).cssRules, function(rule) {
23:23:29.647   return rule.cssText === _this._deletedRulePlaceholder ? null : rule;
23:23:29.647   }));
23:23:29.647   } else {
23:23:29.647   rules.push(null);
23:23:29.647   }
23:23:29.647   return rules;
23:23:29.647   }, []);
23:23:29.647   };
23:23:29.647   _proto.makeStyleTag = function makeStyleTag(name, cssString, relativeToTag) {
23:23:29.648   if (cssString) {
23:23:29.648   invariant$1(isString(cssString), "makeStyleTag accepts only strings as second parameter");
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.648   var tag = document.createElement("style");
23:23:29.648   if (this._nonce) tag.setAttribute("nonce", this._nonce);
23:23:29.648   tag.type = "text/css";
23:23:29.648   tag.setAttribute("data-" + name, "");
23:23:29.648   if (cssString) {
23:23:29.648   tag.appendChild(document.createTextNode(cssString));
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.648   var head = document.head || document.getElementsByTagName("head")[0];
23:23:29.648   if (relativeToTag) {
23:23:29.648   head.insertBefore(tag, relativeToTag);
23:23:29.648   } else {
23:23:29.648   head.appendChild(tag);
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.648   return tag;
23:23:29.648   };
23:23:29.648   _createClass(StyleSheet, [
23:23:29.648   {
23:23:29.648   key: "length",
23:23:29.648   get: function get() {
23:23:29.648   return this._rulesCount;
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.648   ]);
23:23:29.648   return StyleSheet;
23:23:29.648   }();
23:23:29.648   function invariant$1(condition, message) {
23:23:29.648   if (!condition) {
23:23:29.648   throw new Error("StyleSheet: " + message + ".");
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.648   function hash(str) {
23:23:29.648   var _$hash = 5381, i = str.length;
23:23:29.648   while(i){
23:23:29.648   _$hash = _$hash * 33 ^ str.charCodeAt(--i);
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.648   /* JavaScript does bitwise operations (like XOR, above) on 32-bit signed
23:23:29.648      * integers. Since we want the results to be always positive, convert the
23:23:29.648      * signed int to an unsigned by doing an unsigned bitshift. */ return _$hash >>> 0;
23:23:29.648   }
23:23:29.649   var stringHash = hash;
23:23:29.649   var sanitize = function(rule) {
23:23:29.649   return rule.replace(/\/style/gi, "\\/style");
23:23:29.649   };
23:23:29.649   var cache = {};
23:23:29.649   /**
23:23:29.649    * computeId
23:23:29.649    *
23:23:29.649    * Compute and memoize a jsx id from a basedId and optionally props.
23:23:29.649    */ function computeId(baseId, props) {
23:23:29.649   if (!props) {
23:23:29.649   return "jsx-" + baseId;
23:23:29.649   }
23:23:29.649   var propsToString = String(props);
23:23:29.649   var key = baseId + propsToString;
23:23:29.649   if (!cache[key]) {
23:23:29.649   cache[key] = "jsx-" + stringHash(baseId + "-" + propsToString);
23:23:29.649   }
23:23:29.649   return cache[key];
23:23:29.649   }
23:23:29.649   /**
23:23:29.649    * computeSelector
23:23:29.649    *
23:23:29.649    * Compute and memoize dynamic selectors.
23:23:29.649    */ function computeSelector(id, css) {
23:23:29.649   var selectoPlaceholderRegexp = /__jsx-style-dynamic-selector/g;
23:23:29.649   // Sanitize SSR-ed CSS.
23:23:29.649   // Client side code doesn't need to be sanitized since we use
23:23:29.649   // document.createTextNode (dev) and the CSSOM api sheet.insertRule (prod).
23:23:29.649   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:29.649   css = sanitize(css);
23:23:29.649   }
23:23:29.649   var idcss = id + css;
23:23:29.649   if (!cache[idcss]) {
23:23:29.649   cache[idcss] = css.replace(selectoPlaceholderRegexp, id);
23:23:29.649   }
23:23:29.649   return cache[idcss];
23:23:29.650   }
23:23:29.650   function mapRulesToStyle(cssRules, options) {
23:23:29.650   if (options === void 0) options = {};
23:23:29.650   return cssRules.map(function(args) {
23:23:29.650   var id = args[0];
23:23:29.650   var css = args[1];
23:23:29.650   return /*#__PURE__*/ React__default["default"].createElement("style", {
23:23:29.650   id: "__" + id,
23:23:29.650   // Avoid warnings upon render with a key
23:23:29.650   key: "__" + id,
23:23:29.650   nonce: options.nonce ? options.nonce : undefined,
23:23:29.650   dangerouslySetInnerHTML: {
23:23:29.650   __html: css
23:23:29.650   }
23:23:29.650   });
23:23:29.650   });
23:23:29.650   }
23:23:29.650   var StyleSheetRegistry = /*#__PURE__*/ function() {
23:23:29.650   function StyleSheetRegistry(param) {
23:23:29.650   var ref = param === void 0 ? {} : param, _styleSheet = ref.styleSheet, styleSheet = _styleSheet === void 0 ? null : _styleSheet, _optimizeForSpeed = ref.optimizeForSpeed, optimizeForSpeed = _optimizeForSpeed === void 0 ? false : _optimizeForSpeed;
23:23:29.650   this._sheet = styleSheet || new StyleSheet({
23:23:29.650   name: "styled-jsx",
23:23:29.650   optimizeForSpeed: optimizeForSpeed
23:23:29.650   });
23:23:29.650   this._sheet.inject();
23:23:29.650   if (styleSheet && typeof optimizeForSpeed === "boolean") {
23:23:29.650   this._sheet.setOptimizeForSpeed(optimizeForSpeed);
23:23:29.650   this._optimizeForSpeed = this._sheet.isOptimizeForSpeed();
23:23:29.650   }
23:23:29.650   this._fromServer = undefined;
23:23:29.650   this._indices = {};
23:23:29.650   this._instancesCounts = {};
23:23:29.650   }
23:23:29.651   var _proto = StyleSheetRegistry.prototype;
23:23:29.651   _proto.add = function add(props) {
23:23:29.651   var _this = this;
23:23:29.651   if (undefined === this._optimizeForSpeed) {
23:23:29.651   this._optimizeForSpeed = Array.isArray(props.children);
23:23:29.651   this._sheet.setOptimizeForSpeed(this._optimizeForSpeed);
23:23:29.651   this._optimizeForSpeed = this._sheet.isOptimizeForSpeed();
23:23:29.651   }
23:23:29.651   if (typeof window !== "undefined" && !this._fromServer) {
23:23:29.651   this._fromServer = this.selectFromServer();
23:23:29.651   this._instancesCounts = Object.keys(this._fromServer).reduce(function(acc, tagName) {
23:23:29.651   acc[tagName] = 0;
23:23:29.651   return acc;
23:23:29.651   }, {});
23:23:29.651   }
23:23:29.651   var ref = this.getIdAndRules(props), styleId = ref.styleId, rules = ref.rules;
23:23:29.651   // Deduping: just increase the instances count.
23:23:29.651   if (styleId in this._instancesCounts) {
23:23:29.651   this._instancesCounts[styleId] += 1;
23:23:29.651   return;
23:23:29.651   }
23:23:29.651   var indices = rules.map(function(rule) {
23:23:29.651   return _this._sheet.insertRule(rule);
23:23:29.651   }) // Filter out invalid rules
23:23:29.651   .filter(function(index) {
23:23:29.651   return index !== -1;
23:23:29.651   });
23:23:29.651   this._indices[styleId] = indices;
23:23:29.651   this._instancesCounts[styleId] = 1;
23:23:29.651   };
23:23:29.651   _proto.remove = function remove(props) {
23:23:29.651   var _this = this;
23:23:29.651   var styleId = this.getIdAndRules(props).styleId;
23:23:29.651   invariant(styleId in this._instancesCounts, "styleId: `" + styleId + "` not found");
23:23:29.652   this._instancesCounts[styleId] -= 1;
23:23:29.652   if (this._instancesCounts[styleId] < 1) {
23:23:29.652   var tagFromServer = this._fromServer && this._fromServer[styleId];
23:23:29.652   if (tagFromServer) {
23:23:29.652   tagFromServer.parentNode.removeChild(tagFromServer);
23:23:29.652   delete this._fromServer[styleId];
23:23:29.652   } else {
23:23:29.652   this._indices[styleId].forEach(function(index) {
23:23:29.652   return _this._sheet.deleteRule(index);
23:23:29.652   });
23:23:29.652   delete this._indices[styleId];
23:23:29.652   }
23:23:29.652   delete this._instancesCounts[styleId];
23:23:29.652   }
23:23:29.652   };
23:23:29.652   _proto.update = function update(props, nextProps) {
23:23:29.652   this.add(nextProps);
23:23:29.652   this.remove(props);
23:23:29.652   };
23:23:29.652   _proto.flush = function flush() {
23:23:29.652   this._sheet.flush();
23:23:29.652   this._sheet.inject();
23:23:29.652   this._fromServer = undefined;
23:23:29.652   this._indices = {};
23:23:29.652   this._instancesCounts = {};
23:23:29.652   };
23:23:29.652   _proto.cssRules = function cssRules() {
23:23:29.652   var _this = this;
23:23:29.652   var fromServer = this._fromServer ? Object.keys(this._fromServer).map(function(styleId) {
23:23:29.652   return [
23:23:29.652   styleId,
23:23:29.652   _this._fromServer[styleId]
23:23:29.652   ];
23:23:29.653   }) : [];
23:23:29.653   var cssRules = this._sheet.cssRules();
23:23:29.653   return fromServer.concat(Object.keys(this._indices).map(function(styleId) {
23:23:29.653   return [
23:23:29.653   styleId,
23:23:29.653   _this._indices[styleId].map(function(index) {
23:23:29.653   return cssRules[index].cssText;
23:23:29.653   }).join(_this._optimizeForSpeed ? "" : "\n")
23:23:29.653   ];
23:23:29.653   }) // filter out empty rules
23:23:29.653   .filter(function(rule) {
23:23:29.653   return Boolean(rule[1]);
23:23:29.653   }));
23:23:29.653   };
23:23:29.653   _proto.styles = function styles(options) {
23:23:29.653   return mapRulesToStyle(this.cssRules(), options);
23:23:29.653   };
23:23:29.653   _proto.getIdAndRules = function getIdAndRules(props) {
23:23:29.653   var css = props.children, dynamic = props.dynamic, id = props.id;
23:23:29.653   if (dynamic) {
23:23:29.654   var styleId = computeId(id, dynamic);
23:23:29.654   return {
23:23:29.654   styleId: styleId,
23:23:29.654   rules: Array.isArray(css) ? css.map(function(rule) {
23:23:29.654   return computeSelector(styleId, rule);
23:23:29.654   }) : [
23:23:29.654   computeSelector(styleId, css)
23:23:29.654   ]
23:23:29.654   };
23:23:29.654   }
23:23:29.654   return {
23:23:29.654   styleId: computeId(id),
23:23:29.654   rules: Array.isArray(css) ? css : [
23:23:29.654   css
23:23:29.654   ]
23:23:29.654   };
23:23:29.654   };
23:23:29.654   /**
23:23:29.654      * selectFromServer
23:23:29.654      *
23:23:29.654      * Collects style tags from the document with id __jsx-XXX
23:23:29.654      */ _proto.selectFromServer = function selectFromServer() {
23:23:29.654   var elements = Array.prototype.slice.call(document.querySelectorAll('[id^="__jsx-"]'));
23:23:29.654   return elements.reduce(function(acc, element) {
23:23:29.654   var id = element.id.slice(2);
23:23:29.654   acc[id] = element;
23:23:29.654   return acc;
23:23:29.654   }, {});
23:23:29.654   };
23:23:29.654   return StyleSheetRegistry;
23:23:29.654   }();
23:23:29.654   function invariant(condition, message) {
23:23:29.654   if (!condition) {
23:23:29.654   throw new Error("StyleSheetRegistry: " + message + ".");
23:23:29.654   }
23:23:29.654   }
23:23:29.654   var StyleSheetContext = /*#__PURE__*/ React.createContext(null);
23:23:29.654   StyleSheetContext.displayName = "StyleSheetContext";
23:23:29.654   function createStyleRegistry() {
23:23:29.654   return new StyleSheetRegistry();
23:23:29.654   }
23:23:29.655   function StyleRegistry(param) {
23:23:29.655   var configuredRegistry = param.registry, children = param.children;
23:23:29.655   var rootRegistry = React.useContext(StyleSheetContext);
23:23:29.655   var ref = React.useState(function() {
23:23:29.655   return rootRegistry || configuredRegistry || createStyleRegistry();
23:23:29.655   }), registry = ref[0];
23:23:29.655   return /*#__PURE__*/ React__default["default"].createElement(StyleSheetContext.Provider, {
23:23:29.655   value: registry
23:23:29.655   }, children);
23:23:29.655   }
23:23:29.655   function useStyleRegistry() {
23:23:29.655   return React.useContext(StyleSheetContext);
23:23:29.655   }
23:23:29.655   // Opt-into the new `useInsertionEffect` API in React 18, fallback to `useLayoutEffect`.
23:23:29.655   // https://github.com/reactwg/react-18/discussions/110
23:23:29.655   var useInsertionEffect = React__default["default"].useInsertionEffect || React__default["default"].useLayoutEffect;
23:23:29.655   var defaultRegistry = typeof window !== "undefined" ? createStyleRegistry() : undefined;
23:23:29.655   function JSXStyle(props) {
23:23:29.655   var registry = defaultRegistry ? defaultRegistry : useStyleRegistry();
23:23:29.655   // If `registry` does not exist, we do nothing here.
23:23:29.655   if (!registry) {
23:23:29.655   return null;
23:23:29.655   }
23:23:29.655   if (typeof window === "undefined") {
23:23:29.655   registry.add(props);
23:23:29.655   return null;
23:23:29.655   }
23:23:29.655   useInsertionEffect(function() {
23:23:29.655   registry.add(props);
23:23:29.655   return function() {
23:23:29.655   registry.remove(props);
23:23:29.655   };
23:23:29.655   // props.children can be string[], will be striped since id is identical
23:23:29.655   }, [
23:23:29.655   props.id,
23:23:29.655   String(props.dynamic)
23:23:29.655   ]);
23:23:29.655   return null;
23:23:29.655   }
23:23:29.655   JSXStyle.dynamic = function(info) {
23:23:29.655   return info.map(function(tagInfo) {
23:23:29.656   var baseId = tagInfo[0];
23:23:29.656   var props = tagInfo[1];
23:23:29.656   return computeId(baseId, props);
23:23:29.656   }).join(" ");
23:23:29.656   };
23:23:29.656   exports.StyleRegistry = StyleRegistry;
23:23:29.656   exports.createStyleRegistry = createStyleRegistry;
23:23:29.656   exports.style = JSXStyle;
23:23:29.656   exports.useStyleRegistry = useStyleRegistry;
23:23:29.656   }),
23:23:29.656   437902, ((__turbopack_context__, module, exports) => {
23:23:29.656   
23:23:29.656   module.exports = __turbopack_context__.r(898547).style;
23:23:29.656   }),
23:23:29.656   503116, ((__turbopack_context__) => {

23:23:29.662   function NotificationToast({ toasts, onRemove }) {
