23:23:29.662   toast: t,
23:23:29.662   onRemove: onRemove
23:23:29.662   }, t.id))
23:23:29.662   });
23:23:29.662   }
23:23:29.662   function Toast({ toast, onRemove }) {
23:23:29.662   const [isExiting, setIsExiting] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__1["useState"])(false);
23:23:29.662   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__1["useEffect"])(()=>{
23:23:29.662   if (!toast.duration) return;
23:23:29.662   const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
23:23:29.662   setIsExiting(true);
23:23:29.662   setTimeout(()=>onRemove(toast.id), 300);
23:23:29.662   }, toast.duration);
23:23:29.662   return ()=>clearTimeout(timer);
23:23:29.662   }, [
23:23:29.662   toast.duration,
23:23:29.662   toast.id,
23:23:29.662   onRemove
23:23:29.662   ]);
23:23:29.662   const baseClasses = `
23:23:29.662       pointer-events-auto
23:23:29.662       flex items-start gap-3
23:23:29.662       rounded-lg border
23:23:29.663       px-4 py-3
23:23:29.663       shadow-lg backdrop-blur
23:23:29.663       transition-all duration-300
23:23:29.663       animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-top-2
23:23:29.663       sm:px-5 sm:py-4
23:23:29.663     `;
23:23:29.663   const typeClasses = {
23:23:29.663   success: 'border-green-500/50 bg-green-950/80 text-green-300',
23:23:29.663   error: 'border-red-500/50 bg-red-950/80 text-red-300',
23:23:29.663   warning: 'border-blue-500/50 bg-blue-950/80 text-blue-300',
23:23:29.663   info: 'border-cyan-500/50 bg-cyan-950/80 text-cyan-300'
23:23:29.663   };
23:23:29.663   const iconProps = {
23:23:29.663   className: 'h-5 w-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5'
23:23:29.663   };
23:23:29.663   const icons = {
23:23:29.663   success: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__406321__["default"], {
23:23:29.663   ...iconProps
23:23:29.663   }),
23:23:29.663   error: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__1["AlertCircle"], {
23:23:29.663   ...iconProps
23:23:29.663   }),
23:23:29.663   warning: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__1["AlertCircle"], {
23:23:29.663   ...iconProps
23:23:29.663   }),
23:23:29.663   info: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__952571__["Info"], {
23:23:29.663   ...iconProps
23:23:29.663   })
23:23:29.663   };
23:23:29.663   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:29.663   className: `
23:23:29.663           ${baseClasses}
23:23:29.663           ${typeClasses[toast.type]}
23:23:29.663           ${isExiting ? 'slide-out-to-top-2 opacity-0' : ''}
23:23:29.663         `,
23:23:29.663   children: [
23:23:29.663   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("div", {
23:23:29.663   className: "flex-shrink-0",
23:23:29.663   children: icons[toast.type]
23:23:29.663   }),
23:23:29.663   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:29.663   className: " flex-1 text-sm sm:text-base ",
23:23:29.663   children: [
23:23:29.663   toast.message,
23:23:29.663   toast.subtitle && /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("p", {
23:23:29.663   className: "mt-1 text-xs opacity-80",
23:23:29.664   children: toast.subtitle
23:23:29.664   })
23:23:29.664   ]
23:23:29.664   }),
23:23:29.664   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])("button", {
23:23:29.664   onClick: ()=>{
23:23:29.664   setIsExiting(true);
23:23:29.664   setTimeout(()=>onRemove(toast.id), 300);
23:23:29.664   },
23:23:29.664   className: " flex-shrink-0 text-current opacity-60 transition-opacity hover:opacity-100 ",
23:23:29.664   "aria-label": "Cerrar",
23:23:29.664   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__1["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__37727__["X"], {
23:23:29.664   className: "size-4"
23:23:29.664   })
23:23:29.664   })
23:23:29.664   ]
23:23:29.664   });
23:23:29.664   }
23:23:29.664   'use client';
23:23:29.664   ;
23:23:29.664   ;
23:23:29.664   ;
23:23:29.664   ;
23:23:29.664   ;
23:23:29.664   ;
23:23:29.664   function BuscarSuscripcionPage() {
23:23:29.664   const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('');
23:23:29.664   const [searchType, setSearchType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('email');
23:23:29.664   const [loading, setLoading] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(false);
23:23:29.664   const [actionType, setActionType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
23:23:29.664   const [result, setResult] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
23:23:29.664   const [error, setError] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
23:23:29.664   const [esp32Message, setEsp32Message] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])(null);
23:23:29.664   const [esp32MessageType, setEsp32MessageType] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])('success');
23:23:29.664   const [toasts, setToasts] = (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useState"])([]);
23:23:29.664   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useEffect"])(()=>{
23:23:29.664   document.body.classList.add('no-chrome');
23:23:29.664   document.body.style.overflow = 'auto';
23:23:29.664   return ()=>{
23:23:29.664   document.body.classList.remove('no-chrome');
23:23:29.664   document.body.style.overflow = '';
23:23:29.664   };
23:23:29.664   }, []);
23:23:29.664   const addToast = (message, type, duration = 5000, subtitle)=>{
23:23:29.664   const id = `toast-${Date.now()}`;
23:23:29.665   setToasts((prev)=>[
23:23:29.665   ...prev,
23:23:29.665   {
23:23:29.665   id,
23:23:29.665   message,
23:23:29.665   type,
23:23:29.665   duration,
23:23:29.665   subtitle
23:23:29.665   }
23:23:29.665   ]);
23:23:29.665   };
23:23:29.665   const removeToast = (id)=>{
23:23:29.665   setToasts((prev)=>prev.filter((t)=>t.id !== id));
23:23:29.665   };
23:23:29.665   // Limpiar resultado después de 5 segundos de completar la acción
23:23:29.665   (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__271645__["useEffect"])(()=>{
23:23:29.665   if (result && !loading) {
23:23:29.665   const timer = setTimeout(()=>{
23:23:29.665   setResult(null);
23:23:29.665   setSearchTerm('');
23:23:29.665   setEsp32Message(null);
23:23:29.665   }, 5000);
23:23:29.665   return ()=>clearTimeout(timer);
23:23:29.665   }
23:23:29.665   }, [
23:23:29.665   result,
23:23:29.665   loading
23:23:29.665   ]);
23:23:29.665   const handleRegister = async ()=>{
23:23:29.665   if (!searchTerm.trim()) {
23:23:29.665   setError('Por favor ingresa un término de búsqueda');
23:23:29.665   return;
23:23:29.665   }
23:23:29.665   setLoading(true);
23:23:29.665   setError(null);
23:23:29.665   setResult(null);
23:23:29.665   setEsp32Message(null);
23:23:29.665   try {
23:23:29.665   // Paso 1: Buscar usuario
23:23:29.665   const searchResponse = await fetch('/api/super-admin/search-user', {
23:23:29.665   method: 'POST',
23:23:29.665   headers: {
23:23:29.665   'Content-Type': 'application/json'
23:23:29.665   },
23:23:29.665   body: JSON.stringify({
23:23:29.665   searchTerm: searchTerm.trim(),
23:23:29.665   searchType
23:23:29.665   })
23:23:29.665   });
23:23:29.665   const searchData = await searchResponse.json();
23:23:29.665   if (!searchResponse.ok) {
23:23:29.666   const errorMessage = typeof searchData === 'object' && searchData !== null && 'error' in searchData ? searchData.error : 'Error en la búsqueda';
23:23:29.666   throw new Error(errorMessage);
23:23:29.666   }
23:23:29.666   if (typeof searchData !== 'object' || searchData === null || !('found' in searchData)) {
23:23:29.666   throw new Error('Respuesta inválida del servidor');
23:23:29.666   }
23:23:29.666   const searchResult = searchData;
23:23:29.666   if (!searchResult.found) {
23:23:29.666   setResult(searchResult);
23:23:29.666   addToast('Usuario no encontrado', 'error', 4000, 'Verifica email, documento o nombre');
23:23:29.666   return;
23:23:29.666   }
23:23:29.666   // Usuario encontrado
23:23:29.666   setResult(searchResult);
23:23:29.666   const userId = searchResult.user?.id;
23:23:29.666   if (!userId) {
23:23:29.666   throw new Error('ID de usuario no disponible');
23:23:29.666   }
23:23:29.666   // Determinar si es entrada o salida
23:23:29.666   const type = searchResult.user?.hasOpenEntry ? 'exit' : 'entry';
23:23:29.666   setActionType(type);
23:23:29.666   // Paso 2: Registrar entrada o salida
23:23:29.666   const registerResponse = await fetch('/api/super-admin/register-access', {
23:23:29.666   method: 'POST',
23:23:29.666   headers: {
23:23:29.666   'Content-Type': 'application/json'
23:23:29.666   },
23:23:29.666   body: JSON.stringify({
23:23:29.666   userId,
23:23:29.667   action: type
23:23:29.667   })
23:23:29.667   });
23:23:29.667   const registerData = await registerResponse.json();
23:23:29.667   if (!registerResponse.ok) {
23:23:29.667   const errorMsg = typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'error' in registerData ? registerData.error : 'Error al registrar';
23:23:29.667   const errorDetails = typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'details' in registerData ? registerData.details : '';
23:23:29.667   setEsp32MessageType('error');
23:23:29.667   setEsp32Message(`⚠ ${errorMsg}`);
23:23:29.667   addToast(`Error: ${errorMsg}`, 'error', 6000, errorDetails);
23:23:29.667   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
23:23:29.667   return;
23:23:29.667   }
23:23:29.667   // Procesar respuesta exitosa
23:23:29.667   if (typeof registerData === 'object' && registerData !== null && 'success' in registerData && registerData.success) {
23:23:29.667   const data = registerData;
23:23:29.667   // Manejo de respuesta ESP32
23:23:29.667   if (data.esp32?.ok) {
23:23:29.667   setEsp32MessageType('success');
23:23:29.667   setEsp32Message(type === 'entry' ? '✓ Entrada registrada - Puerta abierta' : '✓ Salida registrada - Puerta abierta');
23:23:29.667   addToast(data.message, 'success', 5000, 'ESP32: Activo • Acceso permitido');
23:23:29.667   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 5000);
23:23:29.667   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'timeout') {
23:23:29.667   setEsp32MessageType('error');
23:23:29.667   setEsp32Message('⚠ Timeout: ESP32 no responde');
23:23:29.667   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'warning' : 'error', 6000, 'ESP32: Timeout (5000ms)');
23:23:29.667   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
23:23:29.667   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'error') {
23:23:29.667   setEsp32MessageType('error');
23:23:29.667   setEsp32Message('⚠ Error conectando a ESP32');
23:23:29.667   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'warning' : 'error', 6000, 'ESP32: Error de conexión');
23:23:29.667   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 6000);
23:23:29.667   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'not_configured') {
23:23:29.667   setEsp32MessageType('warning');
23:23:29.667   setEsp32Message('ℹ ESP32 no configurado');
23:23:29.667   addToast(data.message, 'warning', 4000, 'ESP32: No configurado');
23:23:29.667   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 4000);
23:23:29.667   } else if (data.esp32?.reason === 'inactive') {
23:23:29.667   setEsp32MessageType('warning');
23:23:29.667   setEsp32Message(type === 'exit' ? '✓ Salida registrada (suscripción inactiva)' : '⚠ Suscripción inactiva');
23:23:29.667   addToast(data.message, type === 'exit' ? 'success' : 'warning', 5000, type === 'exit' ? 'Salida permitida sin ESP32' : 'Acceso denegado');
23:23:29.667   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 5000);
23:23:29.667   } else {
23:23:29.667   setEsp32MessageType('success');
23:23:29.667   setEsp32Message(`✓ ${type === 'entry' ? 'Entrada' : 'Salida'} registrada`);
23:23:29.667   addToast(data.message, 'success', 4000);
23:23:29.667   setTimeout(()=>setEsp32Message(null), 4000);
23:23:29.667   }
23:23:29.667   }
23:23:29.667   } catch (err) {
23:23:29.667   const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Error al registrar acceso';
23:23:29.667   setError(errorMsg);
23:23:29.668   addToast('Error al registrar acceso', 'error', 5000, errorMsg);
23:23:29.668   } finally{
23:23:29.668   setLoading(false);
23:23:29.668   setActionType(null);
23:23:29.668   }
23:23:29.668   };
23:23:29.668   const renderResult = ()=>{
23:23:29.668   if (!result) return null;
23:23:29.668   if (!result.found) {
23:23:29.668   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("div", {
23:23:29.668   className: " xs:mt-5 xs:p-4 mt-4 rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 bg-red-950/20 p-3 sm:mt-6 sm:p-6 ",
23:23:29.668   children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:29.668   className: " xs:gap-3 flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:gap-4 ",
23:23:29.668   children: [
23:23:29.668   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])(__TURBOPACK__imported__module__63209__["AlertCircle"], {
23:23:29.668   className: " xs:h-6 xs:w-6 size-5 flex-shrink-0 text-red-400 sm:size-6 "
23:23:29.668   }),
23:23:29.668   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
23:23:29.668   className: "flex-1",
23:23:29.668   children: [
23:23:29.668   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("h3", {
23:23:29.668   className: " xs:text-base text-sm font-semibold text-red-400 sm:text-lg ",
23:23:29.668   children: "Usuario no encontrado"
23:23:29.668   }),
23:23:29.668   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsx"])("p", {
23:23:29.668   className: " xs:text-xs mt-1 text-xs text-gray-400 sm:text-sm ",
23:23:29.668   children: result.message ?? 'No se encontró ningún usuario con los datos proporcionados'
23:23:29.668   })
23:23:29.668   ]
23:23:29.668   })
23:23:29.668   ]
23:23:29.668   })
23:23:29.668   });
23:23:29.668   }
23:23:29.668   const { user } = result;
23:23:29.668   const isActive = user?.subscriptionStatus === 'active';
23:23:29.668   const daysRemaining = user?.daysRemaining ?? 0;
23:23:29.668   return /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {

23:23:29.668   children: [
23:23:29.668   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {

23:23:29.668   }),
23:23:29.668   /*#__PURE__*/ (0, __TURBOPACK__imported__module__843476__["jsxs"])("div", {
